title: Evangelion FINAL subforum unlocked
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion: FINAL subforum unlocked             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Aug 27, 2014 8:44 pm In preparation for the updated FINAL Preview in about a week, and eventual news about FINAL, that subforum's been unlocked and already created threads have been moved there. Please take/bump any FINAL related discussion into that subforum from now on! Thanks!

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Aug 27, 2014 8:58 pm Isn't it a bit too early for this? Shouldn't you guys wait until the supposedly new footage from the preview has actually been released? What if we get nothing but an updated version of the eva 02+08 fight from the end of 3.0?

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Wed Aug 27, 2014 9:03 pm It's going to happen eventually... why not now? Also it means we can kick all the wild speculation threads into the 'safe room' and let meaningful analysis rule the main forum for a while.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Aug 27, 2014 9:11 pm An update even of just footage is still an update. We're segregating things off into a new subforum earlier than later so: 1) It can be second-nature by the time big spoilers roll out. 2) Keep discussion nice and tidy.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Aug 28, 2014 1:45 am This makes me happy. Thanks! Finally, that subforum is seeing the light of day.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Sep 03, 2014 6:14 pm Ray wrote: Isn't it a bit too early for this? Shouldn't you guys wait until the supposedly new footage from the preview has actually been released? What if we get nothing but an updated version of the eva 02+08 fight from the end of 3.0?

[]: Re: Evangelion: FINAL subforum unlocked             Quote Post by FluffyBunny » Wed Sep 03, 2014 6:47 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: In preparation for the updated FINAL Preview in about a week, and eventual news about FINAL, that subforum's been unlocked and already created threads have been moved there.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Sep 03, 2014 7:07 pm My personal spoiler policy has usually been: If it's in a preview or trailer then they want you to see it, so it's not a spoiler. Sure this isn't perfect logic, especially in the west given how Hollywood tends to give the whole damn movie away in a trailer sometimes, but I'm sure khara's promotional campaign will be very well crafted.

[]: Re: Evangelion: FINAL subforum unlocked             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 03, 2014 7:32 pm FluffyBunny wrote: Nitpick: the link has "HTTPS" in the beginning and makes my browser complain about the certificate. :)

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Sep 03, 2014 7:53 pm Well after the film hits theaters the entire internet won't be safe :P

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Fri Sep 05, 2014 2:24 pm Silver lining to this cluster bomb of disappointment? I don't have to rewrite my fanfic!
